questions.question: What is Context Managers and why is it important in Python?
questions.answer: Context Managers is a core Python feature that enables structured, clean programming.

questions.question: What are common performance pitfalls when using Context Managers?
questions.answer: Avoid unnecessary memory allocations or deep loop nesting.

questions.question: How is Context Managers implemented internally in CPython?
questions.answer: CPython manages it through bytecode instructions and evaluation stack frames.
